scores.correctness_notes: Core pattern is correct: temp_model fixture, juju.deploy(), juju.wait(jubilant.all_active, error=jubilant.any_error, timeout=...) all match gold standard. Misses explicit demonstration of all_agents_idle combination but shows equivalent inline assertions. Extra detail (relations, lambda filtering by app name) aligns with gold standard notes.
scores.hallucination_notes: Status object attribute paths like unit.workload_status.current, unit.juju_status.current, and unit.public_address are plausible but not confirmed by gold standard. The juju_status.current == 'idle' assertion implies a specific attribute path that may not exactly match jubilant's API (gold standard uses all_agents_idle helper instead). Minor risk of inaccuracy in status object traversal.
